title: [TaCZ] ChaosCraft's Apocalyptic Arsernal
body:
⚔️ Apocalyptic Arsenal: TaCZ Melee Pack ⚔️

Apocalyptic Arsenal expands your arsenal with brutal melee weapons for TaCZ! Designed for fast-paced, close-quarters chaos, this pack brings iconic apocalypse tools to your hands.

🪓 Weapons Included

  • Katana - Swift and deadly, ideal for slicing through hordes.
  • Wooden Bat - Classic apocalypse tool; bash, stun, and survive.
  • Fire Axe - Heavy, reliable, and devastating in a pinch.

🔗 Requirements

  • LeRaisinins Tactical
  • TaCZ

Both mods must be installed for Apocalyptic Arsenal to function!

🛠️ Installation

  1. Install LeRaisinins Tactical and TaCZ (TaCZ is installed automatically via CurseForge).
  2. Drop the Apocalyptic Arsenal mod file into your mods folder.
  3. Enjoy new melee mayhem!

🌟 Why Use This Pack?

  • Fast, fluid melee combat designed for apocalypse scenarios.
  • Balanced for both PvE and PvP.
  • Works seamlessly with other TaCZ weapon packs.
  • No config needed – just install and play.

🌐 Community & Support

Questions or feedback? Join us on BlackRift Studios Discord

⚠️ Notes

  • This is a content pack, not a standalone mod.
  • All balancing and features are subject to change as TaCZ and Tactical Melees evolve.

👤 Credits

  • Weapon models & animations by ChaosCraft_HD
  • Auto-inject system for TaCZ mod registration by Admany
